name: prime-m3u8-downloader-root
description: Root orchestrator for Prime M3U8 Downloader

scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm install --production=false --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend && npm install --production=false --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
